{{Quote|Kill what you fear!|Mika|<ref name="Star Wars: Republic: Show of Force">''[[Star Wars: Republic: Show of Force]]''</ref>}}
'''Mika''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Farghul]] who was born to a pair of [[Death stick/Legends|death stick]] dealers. After her parents went down with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], she held a grudge against the Jedi while growing up to become a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and joined the [[Crimson Nova]]. Over time, Mika built a reputation within the underworld for her resourcefulness and tenacity. She was also the mother of [[Breela]], who followed in her mother's footsteps during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]] and the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|First Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|This guild is mine!|Mika|<ref name="Republic 66">[[Republic 66|''Republic'' 66]]</ref>}}
[[File:Mika.jpg|thumb|left|Mika]]
Long ago, Mika's parents ran into [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trouble when she was very young. Rather than let their business be shut down and submit to capture, her parents tried to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the Jedi and went down fighting. Mika held a grudge against the Jedi for the rest of her life. Eventually, she was brought into the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]] business by [[Stroth]]. Over the years she rose to power in [[Crimson Nova]], and became the group's leader. She developed a romantic bond with fellow [[Farghul]] [[Harll]].

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Mika accepted a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] for several Jedi from [[Kh'aris Fenn]]. Officially she was in it for the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] but unofficially she was out for revenge. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]], [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]], and [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] came to her hideout to stop this contract, which led to Harll's death. Mika was stunned by Stroth when she refused to surrender to the Jedi, and was then arrested by the Jedi.

Mika's daughter, [[Breela]], became a bounty hunter around the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Like her mother, she specialized in hunting Jedi, whom she had a personal reason to loathe, and attempted to bring down [[Kai Justiss]].

==Behind the scenes==
Information from [[Lucas Licensing]] originally identified Mika as a [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/24634274|board=Literature|thread=Insider 89: "Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villiany" by Abel, Ryan, and Joe|user=[[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan_Kaufman]]|date=2006-08-10|time=2:13 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20171111062050/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/insider-89-underworld-a-galaxy-of-scum-and-villiany-by-abel-ryan-and-joe.24222535/page-9}}</ref> ''[[Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy]]'' later revealed her correct species to be Farghul.
